title: Write scripture for Brenda — Sept 2019 Stanford, YES Kennedy-Lugar, Bill Gates todo dump
html:
TL;DR

  • Late-September 2019 todo: "look into Stanford pre-collegiate bs", "sign up for YES Kennedy-Lugar", "watch decoding bill gates", "make moves with Cameron Lewis", "figure out the fork question of future and college" — the entire scholarship/study-abroad scaffolding visible in one note.
  • "Write scripture for Brenda" (the title) is the action item — Yahir is producing written content for brenda aguilera, reinforcing her mentor role and the family-translator function he'd later codify.
  • "Be a doer And take the first step and start some shit" — the action-bias pep-talk he writes to himself in second person, same voice as note as letter to self convention.
  • First documented appearance of YES Kennedy-Lugar (the State Dept high-school study-abroad scholarship) — which is the thwarted precursor to the CIEE / shanghai study abroad route he'd take five years later.
  • "Decoding Bill Gates" — the Netflix doc had just dropped (Sept 2019); this is the earliest evidence of the Gates-as-model thread later mocked self-deprecatingly in 2019 10 12 hide behind bill gates books because you to sad to admit don.

Key quotes

"Have a day mother fucker"

"be a doer And take the first step and start some shit"

"figure out the fork question of future and college"

Why it matters in the graph

  • The Stanford / YES Kennedy-Lugar / Ford / OSU stack visible here is the applied-everywhere scholarship strategy that produced the eventual Ford full-ride — grants pass teen era in operational mode.
  • "The fork question of future and college" is the seed of the recurring legacy question / fear of not doing meta-thread that runs through 2019 — and prefigures the 2024 fork question (build vs travel) verbatim.
  • "Decoding Bill Gates" + "make moves with Cameron Lewis" + "watch decoding bill gates" — Yahir is curating role-models (Gates) and peer-collaborators (cameron lewis) in the same note, treating both as resource categories.
  • "Write scripture for Brenda" is a phrase worth holding — scripture implies authority text, not casual writing. Cross with debt of gratitude — the gift-as-thanks pattern noted in brenda aguilera.

Open questions

  • What was the "scripture" he wrote for Brenda? Did it survive in raw/?
  • Did he actually apply for YES Kennedy-Lugar? If yes, did he get rejected? (Would explain the pivot to CIEE later.)
  • "Table for berg" — what's "berg"? Friend? Class? Possibly Mark Sundberg or similar shortened name.

Wikilinks

brenda aguilera · cameron lewis · stanford · bill gates · yes kennedy lugar · shanghai study abroad · ford family foundation · grants pass teen era · legacy question · fear of not doing
